Retool | Build internal software better, with AI. Skip to main content Beta Explore Retool's AppGen Build how you want. Ship on a platform you can trust. Start building Start building Talk with an expert and book a demo AppGen for the enterprise AI made building easy. Retool makes it safe. Build, launch, and scale internal tools on a governed platform that's enterprise-ready from the start. Build with the tools you already use and deploy on a governed foundation. Guarantee security with inherited permissions—not retrofitted ones. Ship AI-generated code without gambling away your security. Govern The governance layer for everything that's built Governance makes speed sustainable. Every app and automation—no matter how it was built—runs on Retool with your data and operations. Ship securely → Build Create software at the speed of thought Build working apps and automations in minutes—however and wherever you work best. Explore enterprise app building → Launch Reliably bring your solutions to life Most tools get you to a demo. Retool gets you to the hands of real users—provisioned, deployed, and usable anywhere, on your data. Launch production-ready apps → Scale From one app to an org-wide platform One great app is just the beginning. Connect tools, establish patterns, and orchestrate workflows across teams until every win compounds into something bigger. Expand your app ecosystem → Build Create software at the speed of thought Build working apps and automations in minutes—however and wherever you work best. Explore enterprise app building → Launch Reliably bring your solutions to life Most tools get you to a demo. Retool gets you to the hands of real users—provisioned, deployed, and usable anywhere, on your data. Launch production-ready apps → Scale From one app to an org-wide platform One great app is just the beginning. Connect tools, establish patterns, and orchestrate workflows across teams until every win compounds into something bigger. Expand your app ecosystem → Build and run modern internal software Death to boilerplate LLMs generate mountains of code and multiply complexity, not reduce it. Our composable blocks create the perfect abstraction layer. Focus AI on the 20% that differentiates you, not on reinventing the wheel. What BI did for dashboards, we do for apps. Connect everything to anything Your data, your models, your stack. Retool connects to every source your business relies on—databases, APIs, vector stores, and LLMs. Optimize cost and performance with the best model for every use case. Smarter software—on your terms. Use Retool’s AI-native building blocks to power intelligent behavior in your apps, from LLM responses to workflow automation—backed by the models, data, and logic you choose. Integrate with your dev stack Connect with standard developer workflows to keep your preferences and best practices with version control, CI/CD, testing, debugging, and maintenance. Deploy and manage across development, staging, and production environments. Secure by default Enterprise-grade security features and granular permissions protect your sensitive data and ensure compliance. Deploy anywhere with scalable and flexible hosting options — in your cloud, or ours. AI that builds with you Use natural language to generate queries, logic, and UIs that are schema-aware, contextually grounded, and fully editable. With intelligent assistance built directly into the editor, Retool speeds up development without removing structure, clarity, or oversight. All the ways you work, in one place Skip the tab-switching and handoffs. Retool unifies generation, refinement, and logic into a single surface so you can turn ideas into software without breaking your flow. Chat Go from prompt to production Describe what you want to build, and let Retool translate your inputs into functional components and logic. Canvas Drag, drop, and shape complex UI’s Use the canvas to lay out real components, experiment with flow, and see structure as you build. It’s the fastest way to translate mental models into working software. Code Full customization in code Write, edit, and debug directly in our IDE and insert custom code anywhere. Built for—and proven by—businesses of all sizes Over 10,000 companies, from startups to the Fortune 500, run their business on Retool. $6M and 36,000+ hours saved Read story $8M and 20,000+ hours saved Read story 10x increase in patients treated Read story $3M+ profit generated and 80% faster development Read story 200+ users on centralized data app Read story 10x reduction in dev time across 1600 studios Read story The latest Cache from Retool's blog Code is free. Now what? By David Hsu The build vs. buy shift: how vibe coding and shadow IT have reshaped enterprise software By Kelsey McKeon You don’t have to be an engineer to think like one By Justin Chen It's your turn to build Start for free Start for free Book a demo Book a demo

[PAGE: /about]
About us Skip to main content About Retool Help us rethink software development We're building tools for companies to develop better software faster. View all openings View all openings Featured Stories Read about how Retool has helped companies across a variety of sectors. Education NGO Case Study Marketplace Case Study Finance Listen to our podcast episode on Indie Hackers Listen to our CEO, David Hsu, talk about the benefits and the perils of deciding to “go big,” the keys to finding product-market fit and word-of-mouth growth, and opportunities that founders can take advantage of in the low-code space. Listen to podcast Listen to podcast Jean-Denis Greze CTO at Plaid The work our engineers have been able to do with Retool supports our goals, has made meaningful contributions to supporting our customers, and has high ROI from the engineering efforts invested so far. Henrique Dubugras CEO at Brex Retool has been critical for our ops from the start, and is the reason we’re able to scale so quickly. Anything operations or sales wants is built instantly in Retool, instead of in weeks with actual code. And the on-prem version with access controls + audit logs makes it easy to meet our compliance requirements. Rohan Chopra Director of Engineering at DoorDash Investing in internal tools used to be a difficult and polarizing trade-off; Retool helped us to shift that paradigm by making tools a quick and painless part of any project, saving us countless hours of operator and engineering time. Dean McRobie CTO at CommonBond I tell every technology leader I talk to that they should look at Retool as a way to reduce the burden of building admin UIs and democratize that kind of stuff across their company. David Boskovitz Software Engineer at Envoy As an engineer, I love Retool. My team now builds much-needed tools for customer support instantly. Also love how it's so hackable - there's little we can't do. Driven by customers We have a bold, long term goal, but the problems our customers face are very real today. Before Retool, teams had to manage endless spreadsheets, build one-off workflows, and spend many engineering days developing internal tools from scratch. The hours lost are staggering. Tens of thousands of companies use Retool to help run their business, from a COVID tracking app bringing millions of students back to the classroom, to a tool that accelerates student loan decisions, to new workflows to scale customer support. We’re just getting started, and we’d love your help. Learn more Learn more Built for builders, by builders Many Retools joined because they had frustrating experiences building internal software in a prior life, killing productivity. We’re creating technology to help teams operate better, including Retool teams. Every Retool builds, and uses, Retool apps to accelerate their own work. No matter what your role, you’ll be close to the product, and you’ll have an important voice in improving it. Work at Retool Want to join the team? View all openings View all openings

Rich permission controls Grant data-level and role-based permissions for granular control over app and data access. — — Audit logs Track every query run against your databases and APIs, as well as user actions taken in Retool. — — Usage analytics Monitor usage across all apps and users. — — — Source control Use branch-based editing processes that are compatible with Git. — — — Custom SSO Integrate with Okta, Active Directory, or any other SAML or OpenID SSO provider. — — — Connect to analytics vendors Send analytics data to Segment, Google Analytics, and other analytics trackers. — — — Environmental configuration variables Easily define and reference environment-specific values and secrets across Retool. — Flexible spaces Set up independent Workspaces for teams to manage their own apps, permissions, resources, connections, and Git repos. — — — Versatile platform APIs Programmatically manage your Retool projects. — — Limited access Full access to all API scopes Orchestrated governance Trigger custom logic in response to events in Retool, like org invitations or password reset requests. — — — Account Resources and Support Access to a technical advisor Get help onboarding and training new teams, and guidance on how to get the most out of Retool. — — — Technical support Retool's Support Engineering team is here to help. — — — Access to professional services Hire a pro to build Retool apps, integrate systems, or do other development work on your behalf. — How our pricing works Built for developers Every plan includes features devs love and the platform capabilities you need to connect data, build apps, create custom logic, and manage data storage. Differentiated pricing Build and share apps with everyone who needs them, in a cost-effective way, thanks to lower rates for end users. Room to grow Upgrade your plan as your business needs change to unlock additional capabilities for user management, scaling, and security. Trusted by developers, startups, and the Fortune 500 Trusted by developers, startups, and the Fortune 500 General questions about Retool What can I build in Retool? You can build web apps, mobile apps, AI-powered apps, and custom logic and automations in Retool. Retool’s platform makes it fast and easy to connect any datastore or API, build business software, and securely share what you've built with users—all in one place. Who can build in Retool? How long does it take to learn the ropes? Developers are the most common builders in Retool. It usually takes a developer around 10 minutes to understand how Retool works, and another hour for it to feel natural. But anyone who knows SQL can learn to build pretty quickly. (Many of Retool’s most active builders were once non-technical end users!) What’s the difference between building web and mobile apps on Retool? Which one will I need to build? If you need native performance and mobile-specific features, build a mobile app using Retool Mobile. These apps run natively on iOS and Android. More about mobile apps If you’re looking to build browser-based apps, build a web app. (Retool’s web apps only support mobile layouts.) More about web apps What’s the difference between Builders and Internal users? How do I determine user types? User types are based on user activity: A Builder is a user that edited an app or workflow during the billing cycle. An Internal user is a user that didn't edit an app or workflow during the billing cycle. You can restrict end users from making edits via the permission controls (available on Business and Enterprise plans). More about billing and usage How can I deploy Retool? Can I deploy Retool on-prem? Enterprise plans are available as either: A cloud version (that means Retool hosts) Self-hosted (that means you host). To get other people to use your app, simply invite them to join your Retool organization. If your organization has stringent data requirements, you can deploy Retool on-premises in your own VPC with the self-hosted plan. Set up via Docker and get up and running in about 15 minutes. Except for a license check that happens every six hours, Retool doesn't require any external data connectivity. To get started, sign up for the plan that works for you or schedule a setup call . Is Retool secure? Where's my data stored? Retool offers the levels of security, reliability, and access controls that the most regulated enterprises require, along with the flexibility, choice, and customization that developers need. For more information, read Retool’s security documentation . Do you offer special pricing or discounts for students, educators, or non-profits? Yes, Retool has special offers for students, educators, and nonprofit organizations: Students and educators: Complete a student and educators application to claim a free Business account. Nonprofits: Complete a nonprofits application to claim 25 free seats. Discounts can be used towards either cloud-hosted or self-hosted plans. Frequent questions about Agents What are agents? Agents are AI-powered digital workers that use large language models (LLMs) to complete tasks, make decisions, and automate workflows. Why does Retool use hourly pricing? We price agents per hour to mirror how teams already value labor. This model is intuitive and transparent, scaling with real business value. Instead of worrying about tokens, runs, or usage tiers, you’re paying for productive time—just like with any employee. Why do hourly rates vary by model? To model how human workers are paid differently based on experience, specialization, or productivity. We offer a constantly updated range of models with different capabilities—from efficient for simple tasks to more sophisticated for complex reasoning and execution. You choose what matches the job and pay accordingly. What types of tasks are best suited for agents? Agents excel at automating labor-intensive, repetitive tasks, including: Customer support ticket triage Data analysis and report generation Sales follow-up and outreach Cybersecurity alert handling Research and data compilation Multi-step workflow orchestration The speed, 24/7 availability, and cost efficiency of agents benefit these use cases. What counts as agent runtime? Runtime is measured as wall-clock time, from when an agent starts working on a task to when it finishes. Including: Executing steps Waiting on APIs or tool responses Model invocation and response processing Excluding: Idle time, like waiting for human input What if I’m not sure how many hours I need? Start with the free allocation. Usage dashboards and analytics are available to understand your hourly consumption and peak needs. We recommend a six-week usage review to estimate future needs and choose the right paid allocation. Can I use my keys from different model providers? Yes. Will I pay separately for LLM usage? Using models provided through Retool: LLM costs are included in your hourly rate Using customer-managed keys: You pay your model provider directly for LLM usage How does Agents pricing fit into the broader Retool pricing plans? Each Retool surface is priced to match its value: Apps → per seat Workflows → per run Agents → per hour What happens when I use all my free hours? When you use up your free Agent hours, Agent execution will pause. You’ll be prompted to upgrade to a paid plan to continue using Agents without interruption. Ship internal tools 10x faster. Try Retool for free Try Retool for free Click to Pause
